name: Homunculus

### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Telepathic Bond","description":"While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, it can magically convey what it senses to its master, and the two can communicate telepathically."}]

### Actions

If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is instead poisoned for 5 (1d10) minutes and unconscious while poisoned in this way.","attack_bonus":4,"damage":[{"damage_type":"piercing","damage_dice":"1"}]}]
